title: Better Animated Torch Model
description: A survival-friendly pack featuring detailed custom models and smooth animations for both floor and wall variants of regular and soul torches in Minecraft.
body:
This resource pack completely redesigns Minecraft’s regular and soul torches, giving them a fresh and modern look. It features carefully crafted 3D custom models and smooth animations for both floor and wall variants. Fully survival-friendly, it works seamlessly without requiring any additional setup.

The torches appear more realistic and immersive, delivering a polished experience when placed or broken. With detailed textures and a vanilla-friendly style, it adds a modern aesthetic touch to your Minecraft world while staying true to the game’s feel.
